scope: Public-safe receipt for the Discord formal approval lane contract.

adapter_patch.live_profile: GERENTE SOUL now requires formal approval requests to be created through a structured approval-request and rendered in the approvals lane.
adapter_patch.public_docs: Control Tower docs now state that project threads may point to formal approvals but cannot host free-form approval requests.
adapter_patch.live_bridge_smoke: A pending G0 planning-boundary approval request was posted through the bridge with structured buttons, a short text fallback for expired interactions and public-safe limits.

decision.operator_effect: The project thread should no longer be used as the formal approval surface; approval requests belong in the approvals lane with explicit scope, buttons and a short fallback in the approval thread.
